facilities.name: North Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Seattle Public Utilities lists the North Transfer Station as open daily from 8:00 AM to 5:30 PM. Confirm holiday schedules before visiting.
facilities.fees: Transfer-station fees vary by load type and size. Check Seattle Public Utilities for current rates before you drive.
facilities.rules: Secure and cover your load and review current Seattle transfer-station rules before arrival.

facilities.name: South Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Seattle Public Utilities lists the South Transfer Station as open daily from 8:00 AM to 5:30 PM. Confirm holiday schedules before visiting.
facilities.fees: Transfer-station fees vary by load type and size. Check Seattle Public Utilities for current rates before you drive.
facilities.rules: Secure and cover your load and review current Seattle transfer-station rules before arrival.

facilities.name: North Household Hazardous Waste Facility
facilities.hours: King County lists the north household hazardous waste facility as open Tuesday, Wednesday, Friday, Saturday, and Sunday from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Confirm holiday schedules before visiting.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste service is resident-focused. Confirm accepted items, quantity limits, and any fees before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside local HHW program rules
facilities.rules: Confirm accepted items and packaging instructions before bringing HHW to the site.
